uplink.description: Air temperature (23.5 C) + humidity (55.2 %RH) + battery (87%) and reporting interval
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload (S2101 ranges -40..85 C, 0..100 %RH). Three 7-byte frames + 2-byte CRC trailer: [4097]=23500/1000, [4098]=55200/1000, [dataID 7] battery power 87 in low 16 bits / interval 60 min in high 16 bits. expected.data produced via the ORACLE method by running reference/upstream-codec.js (report_telemetry 4097->23.5, 4098->55.2; upload_battery 87).

uplink.description: Air temperature (21.4 C) + humidity (31.4 %RH), telemetry only
uplink._note: Upstream codec.yaml telemetry example input (payload 01011098530000010210A87A0000AF51). expected.data authored from the ORACLE (reference/upstream-codec.js: report_telemetry 4097->21.4, 4098->31.4).

uplink.description: Negative air temperature (-12.3 C) + humidity (88.0 %RH), telemetry only
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload exercising the 32-bit two's-complement negative path. Two 7-byte frames + CRC: [4097]=-12300/1000, [4098]=88000/1000. expected.data via the ORACLE (reference/upstream-codec.js: report_telemetry 4097->-12.3, 4098->88).

uplink.description: Length check fails (not a whole number of 7-byte frames plus the 2-byte CRC trailer)
uplink._note: Synthetic malformed payload: 11 bytes -> (11 - 2) % 7 != 0. Upstream sets valid=false / err=-2 (length check fail) on the same input; we surface it as an errors array per the output contract.
